title: Pirate sword
description: This resource pack replaces the default Minecraft swords with detailed, pirate-themed blades — just like the iconic ones from jaden_man’s videos. Perfect for pirate roleplay, PvP, or anyone who wants to sail the seven seas in style.
body:
**Initial Release (v1.0.0)**

**Features:**
- Replaces all vanilla Minecraft swords with custom textures.
- Design based on Jaden Man style.
- Works for all tiers: Wood, Stone, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite.

**Notes:**
- This is the first stable version.
- No bugs found.
